commands: Consider how composite indexes might actually slow down write performance and provide examples of when this might happen.
Discuss the importance of understanding data distribution and how it can affect indexing choices in real-world applications.
Mention how having fewer indexes could impact read performance during high concurrency, especially when many queries are happening at the same time.
Explain the potential drawbacks of frequently using `REINDEX` in a busy database and suggest alternatives that might be less disruptive.
